answer: As of 2026, Tokyo's population is estimated at 36,954,000. This represents a slight decline from the previous year. The city's population has been fluctuating in recent years.

results.title: Tokyo Population 2026
results.snippet: Tokyo's 2026 population is now estimated at 36,953,600. In 1950, the population of Tokyo was 11,274,600. Tokyo experienced a decrease of -82,600 residents

results.title: Tokyo - Data Commons
results.snippet: Tokyo is a city in Japan. The population in Tokyo was 14,085,890 in 2023. The life expectancy in Tokyo was 84.87 in 2020.

results.title: Demographics of Tokyo - Wikipedia
results.snippet: As of 2025, the total population of Tokyo is 14,195,730 and had the largest population (11.5 percent of the total population). Contents. 1 History.

results.title: Tokyo, Japan Metro Area Population (1950-2026) - Macrotrends
results.snippet: The current metro area population of Tokyo in 2026 is 36,954,000, a 0.22% decline from 2025. The metro area population of Tokyo in 2025 was 37,036,000,
